name: devkit-workspace-web
description: CFX DevKit — self-contained code-server image with Conflux blockchain devtools

scripts.review:phase0:status: pnpm run clean:stale:dry && pnpm run review:phase0:ui-shared && pnpm run review:phase0:scaffold && (pnpm run review:phase0:knip || true)
scripts.review:phase0:status:strict: pnpm run clean:stale:dry && pnpm run review:phase0:ui-shared && pnpm run review:phase0:scaffold && pnpm run review:phase0:knip
scripts.scaffold:verify:assembled: pnpm run scaffold:assemble && node ./scripts/verify-scaffold-assembly.mjs && node ./scripts/install-project-deps.mjs ./.generated/project-example && pnpm --dir .generated/project-example run build
scripts.scaffold:verify: pnpm run scaffold:verify:template && pnpm run scaffold:build && pnpm run scaffold:verify:assembled
scripts.validate: pnpm run check:imports && pnpm run check:packages
scripts.ci:test: pnpm run ci:prepare && pnpm run test:all
scripts.release:check: pnpm run validate && pnpm run ci:typecheck && pnpm run ci:test
scripts.deploy: pnpm run project-example:install && pnpm --dir .generated/project-example run deploy
scripts.deploy:public: pnpm run project-example:install && pnpm --dir .generated/project-example run deploy:public
scripts.deploy:testnet: pnpm run project-example:install && pnpm --dir .generated/project-example run deploy:testnet
scripts.deploy:mainnet: pnpm run project-example:install && pnpm --dir .generated/project-example run deploy:mainnet
scripts.dev: pnpm run project-example:install && pnpm --dir .generated/project-example run dev
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:backend && pnpm run build:mcp && pnpm run build:cli && pnpm run build:extension
scripts.build: pnpm run project-example:install && pnpm --dir .generated/project-example run build
scripts.serve: pnpm run project-example:install && pnpm --dir .generated/project-example run serve
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:repo && pnpm run lint:scaffold
scripts.lint:fix: pnpm exec biome lint --write . && pnpm --dir scaffolds/project-example run lint:fix
scripts.format: pnpm run format:repo && pnpm run format:scaffold
scripts.test:all: pnpm --filter @cfxdevkit/shared test && pnpm --filter @cfxdevkit/mcp test && pnpm --filter cfxdevkit-workspace-ext test
